title: Selection stability and nested validation
key_concepts: Feature selection stability: A robust selection process should ideally pick the same core features even if the training data changes slightly.
Selection leakage is a critical failure mode: performing feature selection on the entire dataset BEFORE splitting into training and test sets leaks test set information into the model.
This violates 'praktik pipeline yang benar'. Feature selection is a data-driven transformation and MUST be part of the pipeline, fitted only on the training split.
Nested cross-validation: When using wrapper methods or tuning selection hyperparameters, use an inner loop for selection/tuning and an outer loop for unbiased evaluation.

definitions.Selection stability: Konsistensi subset fitur yang terpilih ketika metode seleksi diterapkan pada variasi data latih yang berbeda.

examples: Describe a disastrous scenario: running mutual information on the full dataset, selecting the top 10 features, and then doing cross-validation. Explain why the cross-validation score will be overly optimistic.
relations: Directly references Chapter 2 (praktik pipeline yang benar, data leakage). This is a primary home for the leakage callout.
exclude: Detailed code implementation of nested cross-validation.
